summary: Comprehensive testing of Article Email features: Email Templates CRUD, Article Email Dialog with rich composer, and Admin Edit button on ArticleView. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified working. Email sending correctly MOCKED when Resend not configured.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog title shows 'Edit: undefined' when opened via /admin?editArticle={id} URL param. Root cause: openEdit() is called with {id: editArticleId} only (no title), and the dialog renders editingArticle.title before the async API fetch completes. Fix: set editingArticle with full article data after the API call in openEdit(), e.g. setEditingArticle(a) after the GET response.

action_items: Fix 'Edit: undefined' dialog title in ArticlesTab.tsx: In openEdit(), call setEditingArticle(a) after the API GET response so that editingArticle.title is populated before dialog renders. Change: 'const a = res.data.article; setForm({...})' to 'const a = res.data.article; setEditingArticle(a); setForm({...})'
critical_code_review_comments: openEdit() in ArticlesTab.tsx sets editingArticle to the shallow passed-in object first (line ~287), then fetches full article data but only updates `form` state. The dialog title uses editingArticle.title which is undefined when called with just {id: ...}. Should also call setEditingArticle(a) with the full API response.
ArticleSendEmailRequest model has subject as required (str) - frontend correctly sends it. attach_pdf defaults to False. All clean.
Both article_email_templates routes and articles/send-email route are correctly registered in server.py (lines 69, 95).
Email body in templates is stored as HTML (html_body field) - consistent between create and display. Correct.
Mocked email correctly saved to email_outbox collection with full metadata (to, cc, bcc, subject, body, has_attachment status).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass, 1 minor cosmetic bug: 'Edit: undefined' dialog title)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_EmailTemplate_Basic, TEST_ToUpdate, TEST_ToDelete, and TEST_EmailFeatureArticle (all deleted after tests). Frontend test created TEST_UI_Template (deleted during test).
mocked_apis: POST /api/articles/{id}/send-email - email sending via Resend is MOCKED, responses stored in email_outbox collection. Response includes mocked:true field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested and working: (1) Email Templates 3rd sub-tab in Articles admin section with full CRUD; (2) Article Email Dialog with To chip input, CC/BCC toggle, rich Tiptap body editor, PDF attachment checkbox, Load/Save template functionality; (3) Admin Edit button on ArticleView that navigates to /admin?editArticle={id} and opens the edit dialog. Backend: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/article-email-templates all working. POST /api/articles/{id}/send-email working with mocked=true. One minor bug: edit dialog title shows 'Edit: undefined' when opened via URL param. Fix in ArticlesTab.tsx openEdit() function.
